data.name: 金斧偶像-商業貼貼
data.detailed_description:
◆故事簡介

金斧偶像金小萱要與商業貼貼組合的偶像巫小櫻一起來海邊進行長時間的連動啦!容易全lost的巫小櫻似乎被主辦單位誘騙簽下了不平等的商業貼貼條約，嘗過甜頭的主辦單位這次也準備了許多色色的陷阱，兩人必須要在南方島嶼上一邊經營還債一邊進行密室解謎與連動直播，這次竟然還有一些偶像朋友也一起來海邊玩了，究竟兩人能夠找到機會反殺主辦方，還是就要一直被玩弄到結束了呢?滿足粉絲取得幫助將是其中的關鍵!

◆玩法要素

與前幾作類似的經營養成玩法，在有限的資源下不斷賺取還債的資金，同時在關鍵劇情、外出、直播等將進行密室逃脫的解謎

◆遊戲特色

1.承襲金斧偶像與催眠典獄長的世界觀，描述斬斷冰柱後，在南方島嶼度假還債的故事
2.大約十萬字左右的遊戲
3.兩位女主角，不管是各自或是一起，將有多種體驗
4.商業貼貼，胸部貼貼
5.幾位偶像朋友也將客串在密室逃脫的故事中

◆作者的話

商業貼貼是我很喜歡的兩位偶像的組合，就算這不是最後一篇長篇遊戲，也會很久以後才會有下一個長篇遊戲，
為了不愧對這個題材與海邊沙灘的要素，我會努力打磨每一個環節的。
為了賺取資金，作者正在比996還長工時的地方工作著，可以的話，希望覺得遊戲貴的朋友量力而為就好，可以先玩我已推出或我之後會推出的免費遊戲，
我也正在跟大家一起努力著!

data.short_description: 金斧偶像金小萱要與商業貼貼組合的偶像巫小櫻一起來海邊進行長時間的連動，因為簽下了不平等的商業契約，兩人必須要一邊還債一邊尋找反敗為勝的方法，面對色色要素的密室逃脫解謎，究竟兩人能否通關呢?還是會在夏日海灘的氛圍下，一"去"不復反呢?
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 64bit
  • 處理器: intel i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: intel i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

data.name: Hentailive - Business Couple
data.detailed_description:
◆Story

Golden Axe Idol Kimmy is going to a tropical island with her "Business Couple" subunit partner, Sakura Maho, for the Hentailive Summer Festival! Unfortunately, Maho, being a bit of an airhead, got tricked by the organizers into signing them up with a bad contract. The two idols must now pay off their debt while maintaining their streaming schedule and participating in lewd challenges prepared by the organizers. Some of their idol friends have also arrived on the island. Will they find a way to turn the tables on the organizers together, or will they become their playthings? Gaining support from their fans through various means will be the key!

◆Gameplay

Similar to previous games in the Hentailive series, this game features resource and money management gameplay from "Golden Axe Idol," mixed with "Escape The Room" elements during story segments.

◆Game Features

◇ The story takes place after "Golden Axe Idol" and "Hypnosis Prison," centering around repaying a debt that suddenly falls upon the heroines.
◇ A massive script comprising over 100,000 words.
◇ Two protagonists with unique perspectives.
◇ Heart-warming "Business Couple" interactions.
◇ Several other idols will make appearances during the story.

◆Author’s Note

The "Business Couple" subunit is my favorite idol group, so I will do my best to make the game perfect.
I work long hours at my current day job to fund this game, so it might take some time for me to finish development.
Let's fight together!

data.short_description: Golden Axe Idol Kimmy and her friend Sakura Maho are going to a tropical island for the Hentailive Summer Festival! But they end up racking a huge debt. On top of that, event organizers have prepared lewd challenges for them. Will they be able to manage?

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 64bit
  • Processor: intel i3
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit
  • Processor: intel i5
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
